data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md contains llm-behavioral classification
  Verify: grep -q 'llm-behavioral' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references dso:bot-psychologist
  Verify: grep -q 'bot-psychologist' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Task 5 tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill.py -k 'llm_behavioral or bot_psychologist' --tb=short -q

## Implementation Notes — SC mapping
- SC1: llm-behavioral classification in Step 1 (dual-signal, behavioral keywords: skips/misinterprets/drifts)
- SC4: Step 5/5.5 exemption for llm-behavioral (no executable RED test for .md fixes)
- SC5: HARD-GATE amendment (combined investigation+fix for llm-behavioral)
- Sub-agent guard: read bot-psychologist.md inline when Agent tool unavailable (complexity-evaluator precedent)
- Dependency on Task 2 is semantic correctness, not test-enforced
